summary: Added dual-account email support (Gmail + Protonmail via Bridge) to home.nix. Configured himalaya logos account with maildir backend and SMTP via Bridge, mbsync logos channels for IMAP sync, and Logos maildir activation. Build verified successfully.

artifacts.summary: Added protonmail-bridge package, logos himalaya account, logos mbsync channels, and Logos maildir activation
Implementation summary with configuration details and manual post-switch steps

completion_data.completion_summary: Extended NixOS home.nix with Protonmail Bridge package, logos account configuration for himalaya CLI email client, mbsync channels for IMAP sync via Bridge, and maildir directory creation. Build verified with home-manager build.

next_steps: Run home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin, then complete manual Bridge setup (start bridge, login, store password in keyring)
